notes: Creature detail filter links + badge consistency — Faction, Weak-to types, Immune/Resistant/Neutral types, Tameable and attack-damage types all now render as proper pills instead of plain text. Clickable ones jump straight to the matching sidebar filter. Empty filter accordions (Special, Station, Vendor, Factory) now hide when no matching rows exist. Copy-to-clipboard icons added to station / vendor / factory detail headers; Player Data knowledge table copy icon moved inline next to the item name for consistency with Valheim Data. Character portrait now also shows on the Dashboard above Biomes Walked.
